content.en:
As time passed, more and more fierce beasts were devoured by the blood-devouring vines, and their aura became more and more powerful, and they gradually began to transform.

A certain moment.

The blood-devouring vines released countless blood rays, and their entire bodies began to grow wildly, and an invisible coercion permeated the surroundings, causing some five or six-star gods to change color.

Strictly speaking, the Blood-Devouring Vine is a Heavenly Mandate Realm spirit plant, but it is only a weaker Heavenly Mandate Realm spirit plant.

Under normal circumstances, the strength of a Heavenly Mandate Heavenly Monarch who has cultivated to a stable level is only the strength of a six-star divine general, which means that anyone who has reached the six-star divine general will have the qualification to leapfrog and fight against the Heavenly Monarch.

The blood-devouring vine is the strength of the seven-star god general, and it is also average in the Heavenly Destiny Realm.

It can even be said that even if the eight-star god general is strong, he will have to rest in the face of ten thousand god generals.

"All the gods will strike together, and after slaying the blood-devouring vines, they will snatch the blood-devouring vine juice by themselves!"

A seven-star god will say.

"Good!"

The other gods will agree.

Even some five- or six-star god generals are qualified to snatch the juice of the blood-devouring vines, but whether they have the life to snatch it or not, it is not good to say.

Under such an opportunity as the blood-devouring vine, identity is useless, and no one will give you face.

Once you fall here, even if the forces behind you will support you in the future, then you won't be able to see it.

Some of the weaker gods were a little frightened and left one after another, unwilling to get involved in this opportunity.

"Ten Thousand Law Divine General, you better leave!"

General Ota glanced at Ye Tian and reminded.

"Ota God will leave me alone!"

Ye Tiandao.

Seeing that Ye Tian didn't listen to persuasion, he didn't bother to care about Ye Tian.

If Ye Tian really died here, it would have nothing to do with him.

Swish!

The Ota Divine General flew over and stood on the front line with the Seven Star Divine Generals.

After a while, tens of thousands of gods surrounded the blood-devouring vines and struck one after another.

Thundered!!!!

One attack after another instantly shattered the mountain, and the void was shattered.

However, the defense of the bloodthirsty vines was very strong, and it was not killed by a single blow, but only some vines were shattered.

The vines shattered, scattered, and suddenly chaotic.

Some gods will grab some fragments of vines and start fleeing.

"Look for death!"

Some of the Seven Star Divine Generals were furious, and before the Blood-Devouring Vines were dead, these Divine Generals began to snatch the vine fragments.

Rumble!

A mid-six-star god general was directly killed by a seven-star god general.

And the blood-devouring vines also fought back, and with one blow, they directly repelled a group of seven-star god generals, killing many five- and six-star god generals.

Disorderly!

It's still messy!

Greed is buried deep in everyone's heart, and whenever they have the chance, they will snatch vine shards.

However, even so, the blood-devouring vines were still no match for them, and they were hit hard again and again, and a large number of vine fragments fell everywhere.

At the beginning, those seven-star gods also prevented others from snatching vine fragments, but in the end, they didn't care about it and directly joined the ranks of snatching.

Ye Tian also began to snatch the vine fragments, his speed was very fast, faster than most six-star god generals, and the secret breath magic power made it difficult for him to be detected by other god generals, and his movements were elusive.

Therefore, although Ye Tian's strength was weak, he still snatched a lot of vine fragments, and he gained more than many six-star god generals, second only to seven-star god generals.

Suddenly.

The blood-devouring vines were completely killed by a group of seven-star god generals, and the core of the blood-devouring vines was shattered, turning into blood rays and flying around.

Suddenly, the gods went crazy.

This was the core of the blood-devouring vine, and each fragment was comparable to dozens or hundreds of fragments of other vines.

Even those seven-star god generals were crazy, and whoever dared to snatch the core fragments of the blood-devouring vine would be their enemy.

"Kill!"

A famous seven-star god will make a move, and even each other, and some of the weaker seven-star early god generals are often hit hard by other seven-star god generals because of greed.

I don't know how many gods will fall, and the battle is extremely fierce.

Ye Tian didn't dare to snatch those blood-devouring vine core fragments, but it was a very coincidental fact that one of the core fragments that was not small happened to fly to him.

And Ye Tian grabbed it!

The next moment, eyes were staring at him.

In the case of being targeted, the secret breath power is useless.

"Run!"

Ye Tian used his constant light magic power and quickly escaped.

"Leave the core fragments of the Bloodthirsty Vine behind!"

Several seven-star gods roared angrily.

The surrounding space is condensed, if it is an ordinary god general, I am afraid that he will not be able to leave, but Ye Tian's constant light divine power is now close to the realm of Dacheng, plus he is also very good at space, so he directly broke through the space and left.

But no matter how fast he is, he is not as fast as the Seven Star Gods.

One of the seven-star gods came to chase and kill, while the other seven-star gods gave up, probably because they felt that they couldn't compete against this seven-star god general.

He slapped it in the air with one palm, and he didn't seem to think that Ye Tian had the ability to survive in this palm, so he didn't pay much attention to it.

However, he underestimated Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's current strength is much stronger than when he first entered this secret realm, and now he is a five-star peak god general, and he specializes in cultivating life-saving methods, among which the Great Immortal Technique is a great divine power that he has cultivated for the longest time.

With the help of the transcendent comprehension talent of the god-level limit, time acceleration and many elixir spirit plant resources from the secret realm world, he forcibly practiced the Great Immortal Technique to the Dacheng realm.

Although countless resources have been spent, the means of saving life have been greatly improved!

The Great Immortal Technique of the Dacheng Realm, how terrifying its life-saving means are!

This chasing seven-star god general is a mid-seven-star god general, and he can almost kill a six-star mid-stage or even late stage god general with a single palm.

Ye Tian's many defenses and the Supreme Treasure Defense Armor on his body, plus a few defensive charms, were directly shattered, and the whole person was also beaten into a ball of flesh and fell on the ground.

In addition, Ye Tian used the secret breath magic power in time, and the other party thought that Ye Tian was dead, so he did not make another move, but wanted to take away the core fragment on Ye Tian's body.

But Ye Tian suddenly moved again, and the indestructible substance formed by the Great Immortal Technique instantly made him recover, and he immediately flew away quickly with his constant light divine power, and activated a door moving spell, and his body quickly moved, leaving the battlefield in an instant.

The mid-stage seven-star god general was stunned, if he was on guard, even if Ye Tian was very fast and had a transfer charm, he would not be able to move away.

After all, he has too many means!

He could think that Ye Tian was dead, and most of his mind had shifted to other places.

But he never expected that Ye Tian's five-star god general would survive under his palm.

"Constant Light Divine Power, Great Immortal Technique, Three Thousand Great Divine Powers have been fully practiced into two doors, who is this person?"

The mid-seven-star god frowned.

At this moment, he can be regarded as completely offending the other party, and the identity of the other party is definitely not simple, maybe he is a disciple of Dao Ancestor, or even a hidden disciple.

"Hmph, when I step into the eight-star god general and advance to the Mandate of Heaven with a supreme foundation, don't try to threaten me easily!"

The man stopped bothering and continued to snatch the shards of the blood-devouring vines.
